Goldman Sachs Warns Of 'Material Risks' To US And Global Economy Amid Trade War, As Record Equity Revenue Drives Strong Q1 Results
data.description: Goldman Sachs navigated volatility with record equity revenue in Q1 and warned of "material risks" to the economies amid the trade war.

data.title: Jim Chanos Shrugs Off Elon Musk's $25 Trillion Optimus Projection, Short Seller Quips, 'He Thought DOGE Would Save $1-2 Trillion'
data.description: Prominent short seller Jim Chanos took aim at Tesla Inc. CEO Elon Musk's ambitious market cap projections, drawing parallels to previous claims about cost-cutting initiatives.

data.title: Five Years Ago, 31 Bitcoin Bought A House—Here's How Many You Need Today
data.description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) advocates have often pitched it as a form of protection against inflation and currency devaluation.

data.title: As Xi Jinping Urges Vietnam To Stand Against 'Unilateral Bullying,' Trump Labels The Meeting A Plan To 'Screw The United States of America'
data.description: Amid the ongoing U.S.-China trade war, Chinese President Xi Jinping has embarked on a diplomatic tour of Southeast Asia, advocating for free trade and unity against "unilateral bullying".
